channel.title: Modern Investing Techniques
channel.description: Daily investing podcast using AI-driven analysis and modern tools to identify market opportunities, track simulated trades, and teach strategies that aim to outperform index funds. Covering Canadian and US markets with actionable picks, performance tracking, and lessons learned. AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
channel.itunes:author: Modern Investing Techniques
channel.itunes:summary: Daily investing podcast using AI-driven analysis and modern tools to identify market opportunities, track simulated trades, and teach strategies that aim to outperform index funds. Covering Canadian and US markets with actionable picks, performance tracking, and lessons learned. AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

item.title: Ep 3: Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.
item.description:
**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** March 24, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence
**HOOK:** Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.
**Market Pulse:** North American markets opened solidly higher today with the S&P 500 at 6,581 (+1.1%), NASDAQ Composite at 21,947 (+1.4%), and TSX Composite at 31,884 (+1.8%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:summary:
**# Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** March 24, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence

**Market Pulse:** North American markets opened solidly higher today with the S&P 500 at 6,581 (+1.1%), NASDAQ Composite at 21,947 (+1.4%), and TSX Composite at 31,884 (+1.8%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Ep 3: Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.

item.title: Modern Investing Techniques - Episode 1 - March 20, 2026
item.description:
**Modern Investing Techniques – Special Educational Episode** **Air Date: March 20, 2026**
[Upbeat intro music fades]
**Host:** Welcome back to *Modern Investing Techniques*, the show that cuts through the noise and shows you exactly how to use AI, modern platforms, and disciplined strategies to aim for returns that beat the S&P 500, NASDAQ, and TSX Composite over time.
I’m your host, and today we’re doing something special. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

I’m your host, and today we’re doing something special. ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
item.itunes:title: Modern Investing Techniques - Episode 1 - March 20, 2026

item.title: Ep 2: Stocks jump and oil eases after Trump says Iran is talking with the U.S., despite Tehran’s denials.
item.description:
**Modern Investing Techniques** **Date:** March 23, 2026 💰 **Modern Investing Techniques** — AI-Powered Daily Market Intelligence
**HOOK:** Stocks jump and oil eases after Trump says Iran is talking with the U.S., despite Tehran’s denials.
**Market Pulse:** Markets are rallying on de-escalation hopes in the Middle East. The S&P 500 closed at 6,623 (+1.8%), the NASDAQ Composite at 22,087 (+2.0%), and the TSX Composite at 31,809 (+1.6%). ...
AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.

AI Disclosure: This podcast is curated by Patrick but uses AI-generated voice synthesis (ElevenLabs) for audio production.
